_help.note: JSON does not support comments. Keys starting with '_' are documentation only and are ignored by the app.
_help.docker: Mount this file to /home/appuser/app/settings.json as read-only, then mount cookies.jar to /home/appuser/app/cookies.jar.
_help.login: Login uses cookies.jar. Export Twitch browser cookies in Netscape cookie-file format and place the file at ./files/cookies.jar before starting Docker.
_help.login_expired: If Twitch logs you out or cookies expire, export a fresh cookies.jar and restart the container. Do not commit cookies.jar.
_help.connection_quality: Controls watch interval behavior. Use 1 for low bandwidth/default Docker use, 2 for normal connections, 3 only if you want more aggressive/high-quality watching.
_help.stale_stream_timeout_minutes: Minutes before a stream is considered stale and eligible for switching. Keep 5 unless channels often freeze; use 3 or higher.
_help.maintenance_interval_minutes: How often background maintenance and refresh checks run. Keep 20 for normal use. Lower values may increase Twitch API traffic; minimum safe value is 5.
_help.discord_webhook_url: Leave blank to disable Discord notifications. Prefer DISCORD_WEBHOOK_URL in .env or compose secrets for real webhook URLs.
_help.discord_summary_interval_minutes: How often Discord summary notifications are sent when a webhook is configured. Valid range is 1-1440 minutes.
_help.logging_level: One of DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR.
_help.enable_badges_emotes: Set true to load Twitch badges/emotes data if supported. Leave false for a lean headless container.
_help.available_drops_check: Set true to perform extra available-drop checks. Leave false unless you need the extra discovery behavior.
_help.exclude: Optional set of exact game names to skip. Keep empty unless there are games you never want to watch.
_help.priority: Optional ordered list of exact game names to prefer. Keep empty to let the miner choose automatically.
_help.priority_mode: How games are selected: 0=PRIORITY_ONLY, 1=ENDING_SOONEST, 2=LOW_AVBL_FIRST, 3=BALANCED. BALANCED is recommended: priority list first, then scarce/urgent connected campaigns, then other active drops.
_help.proxy: Leave blank unless you need an HTTP or SOCKS proxy URL. Example format is shown in _examples.proxy.
